channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Cybercrime Groups Using Vishing and SSO Abuse in Rapid SaaS Extortion Attacks
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers are warning of two cybercrime groups that are carrying out "rapid, high-impact attacks" operating almost within the confines of SaaS environments, while leaving minimal trace...

item.title: Never forgotten.
item.description: In memoriam. Ayrton Senna, the greatest Formula One driver of all times, lost to this world on May 1, 1994 in a terrible crash at Imola. In the years following his death, some have matched or exceeded...

item.title: 20 Years in Cyber: Dark Reading Marks Milestone With Month of Special Coverage

item.title: Kentwood, Michigan, schools say student malware disrupted Wi-Fi
item.description: DysruptionHub reports: Kentwood Public Schools said districtwide Wi-Fi was disrupted after a student used malicious software designed to interfere with the school system’s network. The district said o...
